race.comment: NEEDAWINNA (7) was too good for a maiden field last start over 1000m at Albury. Looms as one of the hardest to beat again. TESORO MIO (2) resumes today after filling a minor placing at her last appearance at Mornington over 1000m on September 28. Sure to make her presence felt. TALLINGAS INDIROSE (3) dug deep to stick her nose out and get the verdict to shed her maiden tag two back at Wangaratta. Well below her best last time but is worth forgiving. MELODEE ROSE (6) kicked off the prep in good order but hasn't been as impressive of late. Kept fresh and can turn things around.
